prestazioni: EG33 3.3L flat-6 engine: Full forged internals with JE 9.5:1 compression pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei for 9,000 RPM reliability, paired with a custom-tuned Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing sequential fuel injection and individual cylinder ignition timing for optimized power delivery

Garrett GT35R turbocharger (82mm compressor wheel) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 equal-length header and a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust from HKS, including a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 1.2-bar (17.4 psi) boost management

Koyoritsu Racing full-coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable Öhlins TTX40 dampers, custom-valved for the SVX's unique 50/50 weight distribution, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear sway bars, and spherical bearing suspension arms from Whiteline to eliminate compliance under high lateral loads
estetica: Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (SVX-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, designed to accommodate the 275/35R18 front and 305/30R18 rear Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 and 18x12 wheels

Custom carbon fiber engine cover and rear spoiler from Seibon Carbon, matching the SVX's original aerodynamic philosophy while reducing weight by 40% compared to OEM components, with a custom matte silver paint finish and exposed carbon weave accents

Full interior reupholstery with Recaro SP-G Limited Edition seats (SVX-specific mounting brackets), MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK, designed to integrate with the SVX's unique B-pillar structure while providing FIA-spec safety
